sources: federal law on the 2026-2028 federal budget
ministry of finance of the russian federation strategy 2026
russian state duma budget committee reports (dec 2025)

oil_and_gas_revenues.name: oil and gas revenues (based on $59/bbl urals)

national_defense_and_security.name: combined war machine and internal terror

2026.methodology: the 2026 forecast is derived from the official federal budget law. revenue projections account for the 2% increase in vat (from 20% to 22%) and a broadened tax base for small businesses. spending reflects a consolidation of the 'wartime economy' model where defense and security stay above 38% of total outlays. conversion applied at the 2026 projected exchange rate of 80.5 rub/usd. calculations incorporate a 10% 'optimization' of non-protected expenditures due to falling energy prices.

sources: federal budget law of the russian federation 2025-2027

non_oil_and_gas_revenues.name: non-oil and gas revenues (vat, income tax)

national_security.name: national security and internal law enforcement

other.name: education, health, and public debt service

2025.methodology: figures represent the approved federal budget for 2025. conversion from rub to usd at a projected average rate of 93.5 rub/usd. income breakdown reflects the structural shift towards non-resource taxation to fund increased military expenditures.

sources: ministry of finance of the russian federation (minfin)

vat_and_domestic_taxes.name: value added tax and domestic excise

2024.methodology: data derived from the 2024 federal budget execution reports by the ministry of finance. all values converted from rub to usd using the average annual exchange rate of 91.0 rub per 1 usd. total spending figures include additional allocations made in q4 2024 for defense and social obligations.
